title: 支那留學生係英國修咸頓被鬧 'Chinese Virus'

replies.msg:
Another xenophobic act has happened in Southampton, UK, where Chinese international students have been called out, threatened and assaulted for wearing masks.
The victims were on their way to their dormitories when a group of underage teenagers approached them. The group began a series of extortion acts on the victims in the name of 'wanting free masks'. When the victims avoided them by running away, the group started to use the store's trolleys to corner and assault them.
Seeking protection, the victims began their sprint back to their dormitories. However, the group continued to follow them back to their dormitories, where more teenagers joined in the assault. Visible and audible in the video, victims were harmed physically and verbally. Remarks such as 'Chinese Prick', 'Chinese virus' and 'go back to your fucking country' were hurled at the victims.
A parent of the attackers came to the scene soon after the attackers damaged the dormitories reception. She approached the police and tried to get her daughter out of the situation with 'She is my daughter', 'We live right here', 'She is 14". The parent showed no apologies nor empathy to the victims the whole time.
The police have taken statements, follow-ups will be done through emails. !!! - Please, guys, when reshare the post, TRY NOT to use the 1st clip as the cover. I posted this to fight against racism rather than encourage cyberbullying. I do not intend to target any of them. !!! They are still children, and they deserve better guidance and education. I'll delete comments that try to conduct violence.
!!! 请大家在重新分享至story时，尽量避免使用第1个片段作为封面吗？我同样不想助长网络霸凌谢谢

中国留学生因为带口罩而被群体暴力，包括物理攻击、言语侮辱，恐吓威胁。
起因是中国留学生在街上戴口罩，遇到一群未成年当地学生。他们向中国学生索要免费口罩遭到拒绝后，首先冲进某服装店拿皮带在地上抽以示威胁。中国学生开始躲避，他们便用手推车撞击我们。而后，他们一路尾随中国学生来到宿舍门口。
而后越来越多的当地学生有组织的聚集围堵在学生公寓门口，在言语上辱骂、向中国留学生丢东西。宿舍的reception也被他们砸了。现场一片狼藉。
视频中打中国留学生的女生，拿板子砸人，揪中国女留学生的头发，并朝其吐口水。大喊“Chinese virus”，“Chinese Prick”，“go back to your fucking country". 随后视频中拿着板子打人的女生的母亲来到现场，一直自己的孩子辩解。“She is my daughter", "We live right here", "She is 14". 随后警察到达现场，该女生的母亲为其孩子只有14岁辩解开脱，不愿其留下底案。然而，这位母亲除了像复读机一样申辩孩子只有14岁之外，在这整件事情中，这位女生及其母亲没有表达过任何歉意。

A parent of the attackers came to the scene soon after the attackers damaged the dormitories reception. The parent showed no apologies nor empathy to the victims the whole time.
The police have taken statements, follow-ups will be done through emails. !!! - Please, guys, when reshare the post, TRY NOT to use the 1st clip as the cover. I posted this to fight against racism rather than encourage cyberbullying. I do not intend to target any of them. !!! They are still children, and they deserve better guidance and education. I'll delete comments that try to conduct violence.
!!! 请大家在重新分享至story时，尽量避免使用第1个片段作为封面吗？我同样不想助长网络霸凌谢谢

中国留学生因为带口罩而被群体暴力，包括物理攻击、言语侮辱，恐吓威胁。
起因是中国留学生在街上戴口罩，遇到一群未成年当地学生。他们向中国学生索要免费口罩遭到拒绝后，首先冲进某服装店拿皮带在地上抽以示威胁。中国学生开始躲避，他们便用手推车撞击我们。而后，他们一路尾随中国学生来到宿舍门口。
而后越来越多的当地学生有组织的聚集围堵在学生公寓门口，在言语上辱骂、向中国留学生丢东西。宿舍的reception也被他们砸了。现场一片狼藉。
视频中打中国留学生的女生，拿板子砸人，揪中国女留学生的头发，并朝其吐口水。大喊“Chinese virus”，“Chinese Prick”，“go back to your fucking country". 随后视频中拿着板子打人的女生的母亲来到现场，一直自己的孩子辩解。“She is my daughter", "We live right here", "She is 14". 随后警察到达现场，该女生的母亲为其孩子只有14岁辩解开脱，不愿其留下底案。然而，这位母亲除了像复读机一样申辩孩子只有14岁之外，在这整件事情中，这位女生及其母亲没有表达过任何歉意。
